signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts | YES | HIGH**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, but fell short of market expectations of 2.4%, signaling contained price pressures amid global energy volatility.[1]  
Alternative sources report a precise 2.16% YoY rate with 0.34% MoM growth, confirming the upward tick fro
